injuries.comment: Dach did not play in Saturday's (Oct. 18) game versus the Rangers.
The Canadiens said on Saturday (Oct. 18) that Guhle will miss 4-to-6 weeks with a lower-body injury.
Laine did not play in Saturday's (Oct. 18) game versus the Rangers.
Bryson was put in the concussion protocol Saturday (Oct. 18) and did not return to Saturday's (Oct. 18) game against the Panthers, per Heather Engel of NHL.com.
